revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) HANDOFF BRIEF — the handoff_brief must be populated, not marked applicable=false. The call ends as a fragile callback with at minimum five items the closer needs: roof warranty concern (raised twice, unresolved), credit range 640-680 and refinancing backstory, net-metering aspiration as lead close hook, deceased wife's name on title / cease deed documentation, and no bill collected with Rong's preference for phone contact. The codex's analysis_directives.handoff_brief_generation and conditional_booking_detection both require this. (2) MISSED MOMENTS — three moments must be added to cherry_pick_moments: (a) ts 07:12 Rong's explicit competitor-referral request and Randy's non-redirect 'sounds good' — a harder shopping signal than the 05:24 ground-panel enthusiasm Stage 3 surfaces; (b) ts 10:21 son managing autopay as a weak adult_child_decision_maker probe trigger per protocols.adult_child_decision_maker; (c) ts 04:09 20-year roof age against the codex's hard DQ threshold and cross_sell_signals.roof_replacement_planned bridge opportunity — this is the single largest schema gap in the analysis. (3) CODEX REFERENCE FIX — cherry_pick_moments[5] (ts 05:24) must correct its codex reference from cross_sell_signal_detection (wrong — ground panels not an Ion offering) to flip_opportunity_detection / setter_scope_discipline. Additionally, the coaching_focus[0] paycheck-protection framing should be conditioned on lead type being unknown per the codex's lead_types_and_bill_collection_rules, since the bill-required rule only applies to paid leads.
